message:
fix(node): chain_anchor_hash + length-prefix hardening in quarantine.rs, frame_index fix in time_travel.rs

quarantine.rs: (1) add chain_anchor_hash for hash-chain integrity after
push_bounded eviction — replaces weak skip-first-entry workaround,
(2) add length-prefix on all 8 variable-length fields in compute_entry_hash
to prevent hash collision attacks, (3) use monotonic next_sequence counter
instead of .len() to prevent duplicate sequence numbers after eviction.

time_travel.rs: use monotonic next_frame_index counter instead of
.len() to prevent duplicate frame_index values after push_bounded eviction.

7507 tests pass, 0 failures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
